cleavage agent: the proteins on beads were denatured in protein loading dye by heating and then separated by SDS-PAGE
enrichment method: the results showed that streptavidin beads efficiently enriched biotin-Avi-Met1-diUb-DHA~OTULIN-cat
fractionation method: the proteins on beads were denatured in protein loading dye by heating and then separated by SDS-PAGE
